name: Editorial No-Checkpoint Pipeline
description: Realistic content workflow with direct successor routing and no milestone checkpoints.
outcome: A research brief flows directly from authoring to editing without explicit checkpoints.

definition.process_instructions: The audience research analyst drafts the source brief. The content operations editor finalizes it. This workflow intentionally uses no checkpoints; direct handoff rules govern the flow.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.
